name: mixpanel
description: Reads Mixpanel legacy Query API cohorts, annotations, engage profiles, and selected current Query/Annotations API list/detail endpoints.

risk.read: external Mixpanel Query/Application API read of cohort, annotation, profile, saved funnel, event breakdown, and annotation metadata

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for mixpanel (the AuthHook's real Basic-auth username/password + api_secret fallback resolution) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real username/password/api_secret combination and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
